sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.s3out.Docs: The local path to the Amazon S3 storage location where Amazon SageMaker saves the results of a monitoring job. LocalPath is an absolute path for the output data.
Whether to upload the results of the monitoring job continuously or after the job completes.
A URI that identifies the Amazon S3 storage location where Amazon SageMaker saves the results of a monitoring job.
